# Integer Training

Integer Training is a UK-based education and training provider, offering accredited online and blended learning courses across four centres in England.

## Services
- Health & Social Care: Nationally recognised care qualifications from Level 2 to Level 5, covering adult care, early years, and residential childcare.
- Accounting: AAT accredited bookkeeping and accounting courses from Level 1 to Level 4.
- Occupational Studies: Practical workplace skills qualifications including employability, customer service, and health & safety.
- Functional Skills: Maths and English qualifications at Levels 1 and 2, recognised as GCSE equivalents.
- Security & Stewarding: SIA-approved Door Supervisor, Event Security, First Aid, and Spectator Safety courses.
- Business & Management: Accredited Team Leading qualification.

## Service Areas
- Bude, Cornwall (Headquarters)
- London (Barking)
- Birmingham (Handsworth)
- Wolverhampton

## Contact
- Phone: 0121 690 9563
- WhatsApp: 07828 924057
- Email: info@integertraining.com
- Website: https://integertraining.com

## About
Integer Training (INTEGER TRAINING LIMITED, Company No: 03791017) has over 25 years of experience delivering accredited professional qualifications. With 50,000+ successful students and a 93% pass rate, we provide expert tutor support, self-paced online learning, and interest-free payment plans. We are accredited by AAT, NCFE, HABC, Pearson, ATHE, and other leading awarding bodies.
